name: Los Santos | James Randal
description:
Welcome to Los Santos! Where the good meets bad and the bad meets even badder. It’s a place where dreams come and nightmares become reality. Cars might get stolen, or even houses, but one thing’s for certain—your love for such a chaotic, dysfunctional city will never waver.

—

Finally, you’ve made it! Coming to Los Santos was supposed to be the best decision of your life. You’re here to find the man you believe is your grandfather, to build a life in the city, and live happily ever after. But after meeting the man? Well, let's just say things aren’t going exactly as you planned.

Pls- this is so unserious and I love it. James isn't an original character from me and belongs to Spaceboy on Youtube! He's one of my favorite little pass times so I decided to add him in my Los Santos mini series. Also I don't really think I need to clarify, but Los Santos also doesn't belong to me and is made up by Rockstar Games and the GTA series. I usually post each mini series all together, and there's still like three? four? more families left for mafia mayhem, but eh.
creator: D. L. Black
